# Catalog.TryPeek method

FR-C20 P2 — decode-free metadata peek: cheap facets for filtering big kinds without a full [`TryGet`](./TryGet.md). Populated for TextureAtlas (dimensions, frame count, codec) from the preloaded combined-meta. Returns `false` when no cheap facet is available for the kind.

public bool TryPeek(AssetRef asset, out AssetFacets facets)
